_commentScope: Scoped to pure-logic modules. The IPC handlers (main.ts) + secrets.ts depend on the live Electron runtime — mocking them just to mutate would be high-noise, low-signal.
_thresholdsRationale: Ratcheted up as the score has climbed. break=96 (set at 97.04 after gmail/kpi/oauth/skills cross 100% covered + ollama abort/withTimeout equiv + 😾 base64 + swap test, buffer 1.04). 5 files at 100% covered: github, gmail, kpi, skills, oauth. The ratchet is non-decreasing.
